concerns.text: FR-002 ('System MUST execute emotion classification...') anchors to US-1, but US-1 describes data ingestion and metadata extraction, not the execution of an emotion classification model. The scope of US-1 does not cover the computational inference step described in FR-002. This FR appears to be an orphan or mis-anchored; it likely serves a missing story about 'Stimulus Processing' or needs to be anchored to a story that explicitly includes running the classifier.
